property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: viewMode
property.label: View Mode
property.description: Display as related list or table only. Supported options are: Related List,Datatable.

property.name: targetRecordIdField
property.label: Target Record Id Field
property.description: The Id field (master-detailed/lookup) API name from the current object to be used in searching related child records based on Parent Object Reference Field.

property.name: parentObjectRefField
property.label: Parent Object Reference Field
property.description: The Id field (master-detailed/lookup) API name of the parent object used in child object.

property.name: childObjectApiName
property.label: Child Object API Name
property.description: E.g, OpportunityLineItem or rio_ed__Fee_Line__c

property.name: childObjectFields
property.label: Child Object Fields API Name
property.description: Enter the API name of the fields seperated by semicolons to display the list of columns. Please note that Rich Text and Time are not supported.

property.name: childObjectFilterCriteria
property.label: Child Record Filter Criteria
property.description: E.g, RecordTypeId = 'xxxxxx' or Account.Name = 'Acme'.

property.name: sortedBy
property.label: Sorted By
property.description: E.g, Name

property.name: sortedDirection
property.label: Sorted Direction
property.description: E.g, Acsending or Descending. Supported options are: asc,desc.

property.name: enableNewButton
property.label: Show New Button
property.description: Show new button for user to create record.

property.name: enableRowViewButton
property.label: Show View Button
property.description: Show view button for user to view a record.

property.name: enableRowEditButton
property.label: Show Edit Button
property.description: Show edit button for user to edit a record.

property.name: editFieldSetName
property.label: Edit Field Set API Name
property.description: The Field Set Name used to display on the edit and new record modal.

property.name: editFormColumnNo
property.label: Record Edit Form Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: editFormSize
property.label: Record Edit Form Size
property.description: The modal size for record edit form.

property.name: enableRowDeleteButton
property.label: Show Delete Button
property.description: Show delete button for user to delete a record.

property.name: enableRowDownloadButton
property.label: Show Download Button
property.description: Show download button for user to download the file. Only applies when the child object is ContentVersion.

property.name: downloadUrl
property.label: Download URL
property.description: The url to download the file. {0} will be replaced by the record id. Only applies when the child object is ContentVersion.

property.name: maxHeight
property.label: Maximum Height
property.description: Maximum height of the component in pixel.

property.name: showRowNumber
property.label: Show Row Number
property.description: Show sequence number for each row.

property.name: enableInfiniteLoading
property.label: Enable Infinite Loading
property.description: To enable infinite loading.

property.name: rowsToLoad
property.label: Rows to Load
property.description: Rows to Load

property.name: noRecordFoundMessage
property.label: No Record Found Message
property.description: Message to show when there is no record found.

property.name: enableClickableRefField
property.label: Make reference field clickable
property.description: Make master-detail or lookup field clickable to open the record.

property.name: enableRowSelection
property.label: Enable multiple row selection
property.description: Enable checkboxes and allow multiple rows selection.

property.name: enableInlineEditing
property.label: Inline Editing
property.description: Enable inline editing.

property.name: refTarget
property.label: Reference Target
property.description: Target for opening reference (lookup) fields. Default is _blank.

property.name: enableRefreshButton
property.label: Show Refresh Button
property.description: Show refresh button for user to refresh the list.

property.name: enableQuickSearch
property.label: Enable Quick Search
property.description: Enable Quick Search

property.name: tableTextDisplayMode
property.label: Table Text Display Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Wrap Text, Clip Text.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: viewMode
property.label: View Mode
property.description: Display as related list or table only. Supported options are: Related List,Datatable.

property.name: targetRecordId
property.label: Target Record Id
property.description: The current record id.

property.name: targetRecordIdField
property.label: Target Record Id Field
property.description: The Id field (master-detailed/lookup) API name from the current object to be used in searching related child records based on Parent Object Reference Field.

property.name: parentObjectRefField
property.label: Parent Object Reference Field
property.description: The Id field (master-detailed/lookup) API name of the parent object used in child object.

property.name: childObjectApiName
property.label: Child Object API Name
property.description: E.g, OpportunityLineItem or rio_ed__Fee_Line__c

property.name: childObjectFields
property.label: Child Object Fields API Name
property.description: Enter the API name of the fields seperated by semicolons to display the list of columns. Please note that Rich Text and Time are not supported.

property.name: childObjectFilterCriteria
property.label: Child Record Filter Criteria
property.description: E.g, RecordTypeId = 'xxxxxx' or Account.Name = 'Acme'.

property.name: sortedBy
property.label: Sorted By
property.description: E.g, Name

property.name: sortedDirection
property.label: Sorted Direction
property.description: E.g, Acsending or Descending. Supported options are: asc,desc.

property.name: enableNewButton
property.label: Show New Button
property.description: Show new button for user to create record.

property.name: enableRowViewButton
property.label: Show View Button
property.description: Show view button for user to view a record.

property.name: enableRowEditButton
property.label: Show Edit Button
property.description: Show edit button for user to edit a record.

property.name: editFieldSetName
property.label: Edit Field Set API Name
property.description: The Field Set Name used to display on the edit and new record modal.

property.name: editFormColumnNo
property.label: Record Edit Form Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: editFormSize
property.label: Record Edit Form Size
property.description: The modal size for record edit form.

property.name: enableRowDeleteButton
property.label: Show Delete Button
property.description: Show delete button for user to delete a record.

property.name: enableRowDownloadButton
property.label: Show Download Button
property.description: Show download button for user to download the file. Only applies when the child object is ContentVersion.

property.name: downloadUrl
property.label: Download URL
property.description: The url to download the file. {0} will be replaced by the record id. Only applies when the child object is ContentVersion.

property.name: maxHeight
property.label: Maximum Height
property.description: Maximum height of the component in pixel.

property.name: showRowNumber
property.label: Show Row Number
property.description: Show sequence number for each row.

property.name: enableInfiniteLoading
property.label: Enable Infinite Loading
property.description: To enable infinite loading.

property.name: rowsToLoad
property.label: Rows to Load
property.description: Rows to Load

property.name: noRecordFoundMessage
property.label: No Record Found Message
property.description: Message to show when there is no record found.

property.name: enableClickableRefField
property.label: Make reference field clickable
property.description: Make master-detail or lookup field clickable to open the record.

property.name: enableRowSelection
property.label: Enable multiple row selection
property.description: Enable checkboxes and allow multiple rows selection.

property.name: enableInlineEditing
property.label: Inline Editing
property.description: Enable inline editing.

property.name: refTarget
property.label: Reference Target
property.description: Target for opening reference (lookup) fields. Default is _blank.

property.name: enableRefreshButton
property.label: Show Refresh Button
property.description: Show refresh button for user to refresh the list.

property.name: enableQuickSearch
property.label: Enable Quick Search
property.description: Enable Quick Search

property.name: tableTextDisplayMode
property.label: Table Text Display Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Wrap Text, Clip Text.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id (Reserved for Internal Use)
property.description: Record Id.

property.name: useSourceCollectionRecords
property.label: Records are from flow?
property.description: Tick if records to display are from flow.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Record Id or system variable {USERID}, {USERCONTACTID}.

property.name: targetRecordIdField
property.label: Target Record Id Field
property.description: The Id field (master-detailed/lookup) API name from the current object to be used in searching related child records based on Parent Object Reference Field.

property.name: parentObjectRefField
property.label: Parent Object Reference Field
property.description: The Id field (master-detailed/lookup) API name of the parent object used in child object.

property.name: childObjectApiName
property.label: Child Object API Name
property.description: E.g, OpportunityLineItem or rio_ed__Fee_Line__c

property.name: childObjectFields
property.label: Child Object Fields API Name
property.description: Enter the API name of the fields seperated by semicolons to display the list of columns. Please note that Rich Text and Time are not supported.

property.name: childObjectFilterCriteria
property.label: Child Record Filter Criteria
property.description: E.g, RecordTypeId = 'xxxxxx' or Account.Name = 'Acme'.

property.name: sortedBy
property.label: Sorted By
property.description: E.g, Name

property.name: sortedDirection
property.label: Sorted Direction
property.description: E.g, Acsending or Descending. Supported options are: asc,desc.

property.name: enableNewButton
property.label: Show New Button
property.description: Show new button for user to create record.

property.name: enableRowViewButton
property.label: Show View Button
property.description: Show view button for user to view a record.

property.name: enableRowEditButton
property.label: Show Edit Button
property.description: Show edit button for user to edit a record.

property.name: editFieldSetName
property.label: Field Set Name of fields to edit
property.description: The Field Set Name that store which field to display on the edit page.

property.name: enableRowDeleteButton
property.label: Show Delete Button
property.description: Show delete button for user to delete a record.

property.name: enableRowDownloadButton
property.label: Show Download Button
property.description: Show download button for user to download the file. Only applies when the child object is ContentVersion.

property.name: downloadUrl
property.label: Download URL
property.description: The url to download the file. {0} will be replaced by the record id. Only applies when the child object is ContentVersion.

property.name: showRowNumber
property.label: Show Row Number
property.description: Show sequence number for each row.

property.name: enableInfiniteLoading
property.label: Enable Infinite Loading
property.description: To enable infinite loading.

property.name: enableClickableRefField
property.label: Make reference field clickable
property.description: Make master-detail or lookup field clickable to open the record.

property.name: enableRowSelection
property.label: Enable multiple row selection
property.description: Enable checkboxes and allow multiple rows selection.

property.name: enableInlineEditing
property.label: Inline Editing
property.description: Enable inline editing.

property.name: enableQuickSearch
property.label: Enable Quick Search
property.description: Enable Quick Search

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: maxHeight
property.label: Maximum Height
property.description: Maximum height of the component in pixel.

property.name: rowsToLoad
property.label: Rows to Load
property.description: Rows to Load. Default is 10.

property.name: noRecordFoundMessage
property.label: No Record Found Message
property.description: Message to show when there is no record found.

property.name: refTarget
property.label: Reference Target
property.description: Target for opening reference (lookup) fields. Default is _blank.

property.name: viewMode
property.label: View Mode
property.description: Display as related list or table only. Supported options are: Related List,Datatable.

propertyType.name: T
propertyType.label: Input Type
propertyType.description: Generic sObject data type used for input sObject properties

property.name: tableTextDisplayMode
property.label: Table Text Display Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Wrap Text, Clip Text.

property.name: selectedRows
property.label: Selected rows
property.description: The list of record of the selected rows.
